goal: Surface hello@meowtarot.com on the website (user request)
done: Shared site footer (renderFooter → #site-footer, runs site-wide via initShell) now shows a contact line: hello@meowtarot.com mailto + a Privacy Policy link, under the copyright. Strings via the i18n dict passed from common.js (new footerRights key EN/TH; reuses profilePrivacyLink); privacy href + rights localize on /th/. Small .site-footer__links CSS for layout.
verified: chrome harness: EN footer shows 'hello@meowtarot.com · Privacy Policy' (→/privacy.html); TH shows 'สงวนลิขสิทธิ์' + นโยบายความเป็นส่วนตัว (→/th/privacy.html). md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
